content:
Actually, that statement is not accurate. Malta is an EU country, but the majority of its population is Roman Catholic, not Muslim. In fact, Malta has one of the highest percentages of Catholics in the world.

Regarding EU countries with significant Muslim populations, countries like Bulgaria and France have notable Muslim minorities, but none have a Muslim majority. No EU member state has a Muslim majority population.

If you have any more questions about demographics in Europe or specifics on Malta, feel free to ask!
